title: Age of Vikings - Skjaldborg
description: Full combat round workflow automation plus token action ring and selected-actor hotbar for Age of Vikings on Foundry VTT v14. Includes disposition-consistent actor-HUD interaction highlights, a targeted AoV v14 message-mode compatibility fix for initiative rolling, configurable tactical or streamlined combat phases, optional simultaneous live initiative during Planning with a turnless first-round start, phase-staged DEX projection based on actual travelled distance, manual GM current-turn selection, free GM phase navigation, automatic Movement-to-Resolution continuation, acknowledged player movement planning, ordered GM-authoritative plan persistence, phase chat cards ranked by Final DEX and INT, unified debug logging, configurable combat tracking and melee reach, pre-combat actor intent declarations, active-combat-only canvas intent markers with custom Other tooltips, Grapple intent support, engagement stopping, readied-weapon reach and initiative automation, deterministic round progression, and live Foundry v14 validation diagnostics.
